mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS `date`, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS amount, COALESCE(SUM(total_cost), 0) AS cost, COALESCE(SUM(total_profit), 0) AS profit, COUNT(*) AS orderCount FROM oms_sales_order WHERE enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND status != 'CANCELLED' AND created_at >= #{startDate} AND created_at <= #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY `date`

SELECT oi.product_id AS productId, oi.product_name AS productName, COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity), 0) AS totalQuantity, COALESCE(SUM(oi.amount), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(oi.profit), 0) AS totalProfit FROM oms_sales_order_item oi INNER JOIN oms_sales_order o ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND o.status != 'CANCELLED' AND o.created_at >= #{startDate} AND o.created_at <= #{endDate} GROUP BY oi.product_name ORDER BY totalAmount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT o.customer_id AS customerId, c.name AS customerName, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS totalAmount FROM oms_sales_order o LEFT JOIN crm_customer c ON c.id = o.customer_id WHERE o.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND o.status != 'CANCELLED' AND o.customer_id IS NOT NULL AND o.created_at >= #{startDate} AND o.created_at <= #{endDate} GROUP BY o.customer_id, c.name ORDER BY totalAmount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT DISTINCT enterprise_id FROM oms_sales_order WHERE status != 'CANCELLED'

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS statDate, oi.product_id AS productId, oi.product_name AS productName, COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity), 0) AS totalQuantity, COALESCE(SUM(oi.amount), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(oi.profit), 0) AS totalProfit FROM oms_sales_order_item oi INNER JOIN oms_sales_order o ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND o.status != 'CANCELLED' GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d'), oi.product_id, oi.product_name

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS statDate, o.customer_id AS customerId, c.name AS customerName, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS totalAmount FROM oms_sales_order o LEFT JOIN crm_customer c ON c.id = o.customer_id WHERE o.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND o.status != 'CANCELLED' AND o.customer_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d'), o.customer_id, c.name
